description: woodland, a giant in the outdoor shoe industry, comes up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. Stylishly eclectic overlays on the woodsy upper adds an aesthetic referenced from the outdoors. Crafted with hand-picked Italian leather and soles finished with German technology, your footwear closet is incomplete without a Woodland shoe. Wear this with chinos or denims and a checked casual shirt or a tee. Style this with a rugged belt.UpperLeather upper with strategically placed overlaysCentral lace upsPadded tongue with brandingPull loop at the heelPadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleRubber midsoleOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction, a curved midfoot and a raised heelOutsole reinforced onto the upper on the toe box and heel collar for maximum comfortOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the toe boxShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
